name: Hexa Td - Free Game
short_description: A roguelike tower defense game with backpack management and route planning
detailed_description:
A roguelike tower defense game with backpack management and route planning, while also incorporating a number of innovative gameplay elements

Game Features:

Design enemy pathways by combining buildings and walls (enemies will move between buildings);
Buildings have various tags, and they can be upgraded and starred;
Enhance their abilities by arranging buildings (rotating & moving) to maximize their potential (the more stars, the better);
Buildings can be placed on walls to make the most of space;
Semi-turn-based, players can only operate (shop & plan) when upgrading, otherwise, it's a idle game!

Further Notes:

Due to production costs, the game doesn't have a lot of content, so it's completely free;
The development time was short, and there were only two developers, please be understanding and engage in discussions;
For any issues, you can leave a comment on Youtube or send me a private message.
